blockers: Eleven planned agent batches remain to be proposed, approved and generated one at a time.

Foundation, Contract Steward and Evidence Harness estimates total 10.9 focused lead days against the accepted S1.0 cap of 5 days; Dispatch requires human re-estimation, scope sequencing or an approved milestone-cap amendment. The canonical task backlog and collaboration-state finalization remain blocked until all indexed batches validate.
Implementation and Dispatch remain blocked until the completed task-split pull request is explicitly approved and merged.
